mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tb_legal_registry
AND category = #{category}
AND (law_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR competent_org LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT TOP 1 * FROM tb_legal_registry WHERE law_id = #{lawId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_legal_registry (law_id, law_name, law_type, category, competent_org, promulgation_no, promulgation_dt, enforce_dt, status, detail_link, memo, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{lawId}, #{lawName}, #{lawType}, #{category}, #{competentOrg}, #{promulgationNo}, #{promulgationDt}, #{enforceDt}, #{status}, #{detailLink}, #{memo}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modifiedByName}, #{modifiedByTeam}, #{modifiedByPosition}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_legal_registry SET law_name = #{lawName}, law_type = #{lawType}, category = #{category}, competent_org = #{competentOrg}, promulgation_no = #{promulgationNo}, promulgation_dt = #{promulgationDt}, enforce_dt = #{enforceDt}, status = #{status}, detail_link = #{detailLink}, memo = #{memo}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_registry WHERE category = #{category}

SELECT * FROM tb_legal_revision_log
AND review_status = #{status}
AND (law_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR summary LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
ORDER BY revision_dt DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_legal_revision_log (law_id, law_name, revision_type, revision_no, revision_dt, enforce_dt, summary, detail_link, review_status, impact_level, fetched_at, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{lawId}, #{lawName}, #{revisionType}, #{revisionNo}, #{revisionDt}, #{enforceDt}, #{summary}, #{detailLink}, #{reviewStatus}, #{impactLevel}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_legal_revision_log SET review_status = #{reviewStatus}, impact_level = #{impactLevel}, summary = #{summary}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_revision_log
AND review_status = #{status}
SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM tb_legal_revision_log WHERE law_id = #{lawId} AND revision_dt = #{revisionDt}
